title: roegneria macroura
intro: Roegneria macroura, also known as Roegneria, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of China. Traditionally, Roegneria has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Roegneria include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote respiratory health. Roegneria is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used as a component in traditional Chinese medicine preparations, such as decoctions and infusions.
